title: The Lion and the Mouse
content:
A little mouse ran over a sleeping lion.

The lion woke up. He caught the mouse in his big paw.

"Please let me go!" said the mouse. "One day I will help you."

The lion laughed. "How can a tiny mouse help me?"

But the lion let the mouse go.

Many days later, the lion got caught in a hunter's net.

He roared and roared, but he could not get free.

The little mouse heard the lion. She ran to help.

The mouse chewed through the ropes with her tiny teeth.

Soon the lion was free!

"Thank you, little friend," said the lion.

"Little friends can be great friends," said the mouse.

The End.

author: Aesop
